synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1843 Important: Oracle Linux 10 nodejs22 security update
description:
[1:22.22.0-3]
- Bump release to get correct RHEL build

[1:22.22.0-2]
- Filter for nodejs22.fmf in gating plan

[1:22.22.0-1]
- Update to 22.22.0

[1:22.19.0-3]
- Unit-tests adjustment - disable internet/test-dgram-membership
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-1843

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1843.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
nodejs-22.22.0-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
nodejs-devel-22.22.0-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
nodejs-docs-22.22.0-3.el10_1.noarch.rpm
nodejs-full-i18n-22.22.0-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
nodejs-libs-22.22.0-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
nodejs-npm-10.9.4-1.22.22.0.3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
nodejs-22.22.0-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
nodejs-devel-22.22.0-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
nodejs-docs-22.22.0-3.el10_1.noarch.rpm
nodejs-full-i18n-22.22.0-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
nodejs-libs-22.22.0-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
nodejs-npm-10.9.4-1.22.22.0.3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/nodejs22-22.22.0-3.el10_1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-55130
CVE-2025-55131
CVE-2025-55132
CVE-2025-59465
CVE-2025-59466
CVE-2026-21637




Description of changes:

[1:22.22.0-3]
- Bump release to get correct RHEL build

[1:22.22.0-2]
- Filter for nodejs22.fmf in gating plan

[1:22.22.0-1]
- Update to 22.22.0

[1:22.19.0-3]
- Unit-tests adjustment - disable internet/test-dgram-membership
